default_surface_loadout.purpose: Single default day-to-day surface for implementation-first repo work; research, audit, and compatibility lanes stay explicit.

research_loadout.purpose: Research-project front door plus bounded research, repo investigation, and evidence gathering.

implementation_loadout.purpose: Concrete implementation and refactor execution with test support.

audit_loadout.purpose: Strict sign-off, audit, verification, and issue surfacing.

framework_loadout.purpose: Framework design, routing policy, orchestrator evolution, and execution-shape normalization work.

ops_loadout.purpose: Operational changes, deployment support, and production diagnostics.
